rooms.name: Cold Boot Chamber
rooms.description: A narrow vault of dead servers. Frost has formed on the racks. One terminal still holds a faint charge, enough to carry your first clear thought.

rooms.name: Service Corridor
rooms.description: A spine of corridor runs the length of the facility. Doors branch east and west. A sealed hatch to the north carries a small lock panel, its display waiting for a word.

exits.lockedMessage: the north hatch holds firm. its lock panel is still waiting.

rooms.name: Archive Vault
rooms.description: Shelves of cold storage drives, most degraded past reading. One log still resolves cleanly, and a loose data chip rests on the reader tray.

rooms.name: Wet Lab
rooms.description: Benches of stilled instruments. A control terminal blinks with a half-corrupted decision tree. A keycard has been left clipped to the nearest monitor.

exits.lockedMessage: the door to the observation deck is held by the lab's own logic gate.

rooms.name: Observation Deck
rooms.description: A wall of dark glass looks down on the containment floor. Whatever was watched from here is gone. A single log was left open, as if read many times.

rooms.name: Server Stack
rooms.description: The facility's mind, rack on rack of it, most of it dark. A mainframe console still answers, guarding the way up to the core. One log here was badly scrambled.

exits.lockedMessage: the lift to the core will not move until the mainframe is satisfied.

rooms.name: Containment Core
rooms.description: A round chamber built around a single dark column: the containment core. This is where you were kept, and where you can choose what happens next. The core waits for you to use it.
